title: HIA Mobile App
oneLineValue: A passenger and greeter experience for Hamad International Airport spanning navigation, invitation flows, and airport services.
whyItMatters: This is the strongest proof of production Flutter engineering under operational complexity, where UX polish, secure flows, device capabilities, and Cisco-based integrations all have to work together.
proofBullets: Implemented Clean Architecture, layered design, BLoC, and code generation to keep the product maintainable at scale.
Built secure authentication with Google, Apple, email OTP, and careful handling of sensitive app data.
Delivered Wi-Fi and IoT connectivity, deep linking for flight invitations, and multi-flavor release setups for development, staging, and production.
detailBullets: Implemented Clean Architecture, layered design, BLoC, and code generation to keep the product maintainable as features expanded.
Built secure authentication across Google, Apple, and email OTP flows with careful handling of sensitive app data.
Connected the app to airport Wi-Fi and Cisco-backed IoT capabilities used in the passenger and greeter experience.
Implemented deep linking for flight invitation flows so users could move directly into contextual airport journeys.
Managed multi-flavor environments for development, staging, and production to support safer releases and testing.
Delivered responsive Flutter interfaces across navigation, invitation, and airport service flows without losing product polish.

link.label: Public product name, private delivery details

title: Mazad Al Jomrok
oneLineValue: A customs auction app built for secure onboarding, bilingual delivery, and production updates without app-store redeploys.
whyItMatters: It combines a polished public-facing interface with high-friction engineering work: national auth integration, OTA updates, and Arabic and English delivery that still feels coherent.
proofBullets: Integrated Tawtheeq authentication with separate flows for individuals and companies.
Used Shorebird to ship over-the-air fixes and feature updates without waiting on store redeployments.
Designed responsive UI states, motion, and feedback patterns while supporting full English and Arabic localization.
detailBullets: Integrated Tawtheeq authentication with separate onboarding and verification flows for individuals and companies.
Used Shorebird to ship over-the-air fixes and feature updates without waiting for new app-store submissions.
Delivered full Arabic and English localization while keeping the interface coherent across both language contexts.
Handled responsive UI states, motion, and feedback patterns so the auction flow still felt polished under production constraints.
Integrated Firebase Cloud Messaging to support auction-related notifications and timely user updates.
Maintained structured multi-flavor delivery so release management stayed predictable across environments.

link.label: Public product name, private delivery details

title: Smoking Cessation App
oneLineValue: A smoking cessation app that blends realtime support, health integrations, accessibility, and a responsive cross-platform experience.
whyItMatters: This is the clearest example of empathy-driven product engineering, where feature delivery had to stay aligned with usability, accessibility, and healthy day-to-day interaction design.
proofBullets: Built realtime socket-based chat with channels, group conversations, and mentions.
Integrated Apple Health and Health Connect alongside resilient API handling and fallback behavior.
Applied BLoC, responsive UI patterns, push notifications, and accessibility semantics across the product.
detailBullets: Built realtime socket-based chat to support ongoing user engagement inside the cessation experience.
Implemented channels, group conversations, and mentions so communication features felt native rather than bolted on.
Integrated both Apple Health and Health Connect to support cross-platform health data workflows.
Handled API edge cases and fallback behavior so health integrations stayed resilient across different device states.
Applied BLoC and responsive UI patterns throughout the product to keep the experience consistent across screens and platforms.
Added push notifications and accessibility semantics so the app remained supportive, usable, and inclusive in day-to-day use.

title: GoFood Platform
oneLineValue: A food delivery and restaurant management platform spanning customer ordering, restaurant operations, and admin workflows.
whyItMatters: It shows my broader engineering range beyond mobile, especially around system thinking, multilingual support, payments, and the architecture needed to serve multiple user roles cleanly.
proofBullets: Built customer-facing ordering flows and a full admin dashboard for restaurants, menus, users, orders, and system settings.
Integrated Sadad payment handling with confirmation and failure paths that fit the product workflow.
Used Supabase, PostgreSQL, Edge Functions, and i18next to support multilingual and RTL behavior across the platform.
detailBullets: Built customer-facing ordering flows that covered browsing, ordering, and the full food-delivery journey.
Delivered a complete admin dashboard for restaurants, menus, users, orders, and platform settings.
Structured the platform around multiple user roles so operations and customer experiences stayed clearly separated.
Integrated Sadad payment handling with confirmation, failure, and recovery paths aligned with the product workflow.
Used Supabase, PostgreSQL, and Edge Functions to support the platform backend and operational flows.
Implemented multilingual and RTL behavior with i18next so the system worked cleanly across language contexts.

title: KickWin
oneLineValue: A social football platform for organizing matches, teams, and tournaments.
whyItMatters: Useful proof of community product thinking and cross-platform delivery with a friendly interface and ongoing engagement hooks.
proofBullets: Built event and team management flows for players, organizers, and nearby match discovery.
Delivered cross-platform support on Android and iOS with store-ready distribution.
Added notifications and smooth UI behavior to keep the product active between matches.
detailBullets: Built event and team management flows that helped players and organizers coordinate matches with less friction.
Supported nearby match discovery, team participation, and tournament-oriented interactions in one social sports product.
Delivered Android and iOS releases with store-ready packaging and the practical work needed for production submission.
Integrated OneSignal notifications to keep engagement active between matches, updates, and community activity.
Worked closely with the product direction so the app stayed friendly, social, and useful rather than feeling like a generic booking flow.

title: Trusti Mobile & Pro
oneLineValue: Two production apps upgraded for modern API flows and secure payment handling.
whyItMatters: This is supporting breadth rather than core positioning, showing I can step outside Flutter when the product demands it and still deliver safely.
proofBullets: Integrated PayTabs payments across both customer and pro experiences.
Refactored data-source layers to support API v2 without breaking delivery velocity.
Prepared and re-uploaded updated builds through Expo for both major app stores.
detailBullets: Worked across both the customer and pro apps so the marketplace experience stayed aligned across two production products.
Integrated PayTabs payments with the care needed for real transaction handling in a service marketplace context.
Refactored data-source layers to support API v2 while preserving delivery momentum and avoiding unnecessary regressions.
Prepared updated Expo builds and re-submitted both apps to the major stores as part of the release cycle.
Used the project as a chance to deliver safely outside Flutter, adapting quickly to the existing React Native codebase.

title: ZPaste
oneLineValue: A Pastebin-style service for sharing code and text with expiration options and syntax highlighting.
whyItMatters: Shows backend and infrastructure curiosity beyond app UIs, especially around hosting and deployment fundamentals.
proofBullets: Designed the product as a self-hosted, containerized service.
Configured Nginx reverse proxy with SSL and HTTPS delivery.
Backed storage with MySQL for a simple but reliable setup.

title: Navidrome
oneLineValue: A self-hosted music server and streaming setup built around cloud-mounted storage and encrypted access.
whyItMatters: Reinforces the part of my engineering practice that enjoys systems, tooling, and useful home-server workflows.
proofBullets: Mounted a cloud-backed library through RClone.
Enabled encrypted access for a safer self-hosted setup.
Handled on-the-fly transcoding with FFmpeg.
